ques: Identify today's top headline in the Soccer section of ESPN, and summarize the main points of that article.
answer: ESPN Soccer's top headline is the lead "World Cup Daily LIVE" blog — "World Cup LIVE: Haaland on bench as Norway, France battle to win Group I." It covers the final 2026 World Cup group-stage matchdays: Group I (Norway vs. France for top spot, with Haaland benched; Senegal vs. Iraq for third), Group H (Cape Verde vs. Saudi Arabia, Spain vs. Uruguay), and Group G (Egypt vs. Iran, New Zealand vs. Belgium), plus surrounding news such as Lamine Yamal receiving a WWE belt and positive USMNT contract-extension talks with coach Mauricio Pochettino ahead of the U.S.'s round-of-32 game vs. Bosnia-Herzegovina.
